conversation.content: Let's have a chemistry class. Today we will learn the rule for the decomposition of carbon dioxide in the world of Azeroth.
My notebook is ready. Let's begin.

In this world, carbon dioxide can be easily decomposed, and hydrogen molecules will be generated out of thin air during the process. That is, each carbon dioxide molecule will produce one hydrogen molecule, one carbon atom, and one oxygen molecule after decomposition.
This rule is the foundation for our future study of more complex chemical reactions.
